S.FORM: ci Mikaylangcilu,tadangangan nida sa ci Mikaylangcilu.ti. Lutuwiyke. Punalutisimung, dumasa mikawanceli, mikaylan cilu, maykaylaancilu, mikawancenu, mikaylangcilu, nu iytali yumahekalekal u sitangahay a tademaw, sinalima'an ,
S.PHON: ¶i mikajr~…ĺaŇč ¶ir~…ĺu,tadaŇčaŇčan nida sa ¶i mikajr~…ĺaŇč ¶ir~…ĺu.ti. r~…ĺutuwijk…ô. punar~…ĺutisimuŇč, dumasa mikawan ¶…ôr~…ĺi, mikajr~…ĺan ¶ir~…ĺu, majkajr~…ĺaan ¶ir~…ĺu, mikawan ¶…ônu, mikajr~…ĺaŇč ¶ir~…ĺu, nu ijtar~…ĺi jumańß…ôkar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ u sitaŇčańßaj a tad…ômaw, sinar~…ĺima Ē~ °an ,
S.FORM: ci Mikaylangcilu,tadangangan nida sa ci Mikaylangcilu.ti. Lutuwiyke. Punalutisimung, dumasa mikawanceli, mikaylan cilu, maykaylaancilu, mikawancenu, mikaylangcilu, nu iytali yumahekalekal u sitangahay a tademaw, sinalima'an ,
